vision: A mobile app that helps individuals manage their daily tasks through simple task creation, completion tracking, and organisation without the complexity of full project management tools.

epics.name: Task Creation & Editing
epics.description: Core functionality enabling users to create new tasks and modify existing ones to maintain an accurate task list

stories.title: Create a new task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to create a new task with a title, so that I can capture items I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button and enter a title and save Then the new task appears in my task list
Given I am creating a new task When I leave the title empty and try to save Then I see a validation error and the task is not created
stories.notes: Foundation for all task management functionality

stories.title: Add optional due date to task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to add an optional due date when creating a task, so that I can track when tasks need to be completed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a new task When I tap the due date field Then I can select a date from a date picker
Given I am creating a new task When I do not set a due date and save Then the task is created without a due date

stories.title: Edit an existing task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to edit an existing task, so that I can correct mistakes or update task details
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an existing task When I tap on the task to edit it Then I can modify the title and due date
Given I am editing a task When I save my changes Then the updated task details are displayed in the list
stories.notes: Assumed requirement based on user need to correct mistakes

epics.name: Task Completion & Deletion
epics.description: Functionality allowing users to mark tasks as complete and remove tasks from their list

stories.title: Mark a task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress through my to-do list
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an incomplete task When I tap the completion checkbox or button Then the task is marked as complete with visual indication
Given I have a completed task When I tap the completion checkbox or button Then the task is marked as incomplete

stories.title: Delete a task from the list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to delete a task from my list, so that I can remove items that are no longer relevant
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a task in my list When I perform the delete action Then the task is removed from the list
Given I am about to delete a task When I confirm the deletion Then the task is permanently removed and cannot be recovered

epics.name: Task List Display
epics.description: Core viewing functionality to display all tasks in an organised list format

stories.title: View all tasks in list format
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to view all my tasks in a list format, so that I can see everything I need to do at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I have tasks in my list When I open the app Then I see all my tasks displayed in a list
Given I have tasks with due dates When I view the list Then I can see the task title and due date for each task

stories.title: Display empty state for no tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to see a helpful message when I have no tasks, so that I know how to get started
acceptance_criteria: Given I have no tasks in my list When I view the task list Then I see an empty state message indicating no tasks exist
Given I see the empty state When I look at the screen Then I see a clear prompt to create my first task

epics.name: Task Filtering
epics.description: Filtering capabilities to help users focus on specific subsets of their tasks

stories.title: Filter to show only incomplete tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my list to show only incomplete tasks, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I apply the incomplete filter Then I see only incomplete tasks
Given I have the incomplete filter active When I mark a task complete Then it is removed from the filtered view

stories.title: Filter to show only completed tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my list to show only completed tasks, so that I can review what I have accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I apply the completed filter Then I see only completed tasks
Given I have the completed filter active When I mark a task incomplete Then it is removed from the filtered view

epics.name: Task Sorting
epics.description: Sorting functionality to help users prioritise and organise their task view

stories.title: Sort tasks by due date
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to sort my tasks by due date, so that I can see upcoming deadlines first
acceptance_criteria: Given I have tasks with various due dates When I sort by due date Then tasks are ordered with earliest due dates first
Given I have tasks with and without due dates When I sort by due date Then tasks without due dates appear at the end of the list

epics.name: Data Persistence
epics.description: Local storage functionality to ensure tasks are saved and available across app sessions

stories.title: Persist tasks locally on device
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want my tasks to be saved locally on my device, so that I don't lose my data when I close the app
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I close and reopen the app Then all my tasks are still present
Given I have marked tasks as complete When I close and reopen the app Then the completion status is preserved
stories.notes: Critical for walking skeleton - enables data retention

epics.name: Performance & Platform
epics.description: Technical requirements ensuring the app performs well and is available on both mobile platforms

stories.title: Load task list within one second
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want the task list to load quickly, so that I can immediately see and manage my tasks
acceptance_criteria: Given I have up to 100 tasks stored When I open the app Then the task list displays within 1 second
Given I am viewing the task list When I apply a filter Then the filtered results display within 1 second

stories.title: Support iOS platform
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to use the app on my iOS device, so that I can manage tasks on my preferred mobile platform
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an iOS device When I download and install the app Then it runs correctly on iOS
Given I am using iOS When I interact with the app Then all features work as expected
stories.notes: Platform requirement - part of walking skeleton

stories.title: Support Android platform
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to use the app on my Android device, so that I can manage tasks on my preferred mobile platform
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an Android device When I download and install the app Then it runs correctly on Android
Given I am using Android When I interact with the app Then all features work as expected
stories.notes: Platform requirement - part of walking skeleton
